tasks.title: Concurrent Sliding-Window Rate Limiter
tasks.description: Hybrid token bucket + sliding window log rate limiter with per-key isolation, clock skew handling, and precise retryAfterMs calculation.

tasks.title: Event Sourcing with Snapshotting
tasks.description: Event-sourced cart aggregate with 5 event types, automatic snapshotting, replay-from-snapshot consistency, and payload validation.

tasks.title: Dependency-Aware Task Scheduler
tasks.description: DAG task scheduler with priority-based greedy scheduling, resource constraints, cycle detection, anti-starvation boost, critical path analysis, and topological ordering.

tasks.title: Multi-Currency Double-Entry Ledger
tasks.description: Double-entry bookkeeping with multi-currency journal entries, exchange rate staleness detection, inverse rate inference, settlement, balance sheets, and rounding.

tasks.title: RBAC with Temporal Permissions
tasks.description: Role-based access control with time-bounded grants, transitive role inheritance, wildcard matching, deny-takes-precedence, retroactive revocation, and cycle detection.
